title: Remove Gemini API system and replace with local candle analysis engine

requirements.summary: Remove entire Gemini/API integration from frontend including API key input field, validation logic, and related hooks
acceptanceCriteria: No Gemini API key field appears anywhere in the Settings page
No API calls to external endpoints are made during analysis
No API key validation or error messages related to missing API keys appear
frontend/src/config/apiConfig.ts is deleted or fully emptied of API configuration
All other settings (theme, timeframe, sensitivity, daily limit) remain functional

file_operations.description: Delete the entire API configuration file that contains Gemini API URL building, header generation, and API key validation functions
Delete the external analysis API service that preprocesses images and sends them to Gemini Vision API
Remove getGeminiApiKey query hook and setGeminiApiKey mutation hook. Keep all other hooks (analyses, settings, daily operation progress) intact
Remove the Gemini API key input section and all related state/validation logic. Keep theme toggle, notifications, and other settings controls unchanged

requirements.summary: Create local client-side candle analysis engine that detects candlesticks from chart screenshots and predicts next-candle probabilities
acceptanceCriteria: localCandleAnalysis.ts exists and exports an analyzeChartImage(file: File) function
Function returns a typed LocalAnalysisResult without making any HTTP requests
Detected candle count is between 5 and 7 when chart is identifiable
probabilidade_alta + probabilidade_baixa === 100 in all valid results
sinal is 'COMPRA' when probabilidade_alta >= 60, 'VENDA' when probabilidade_baixa >= 60, otherwise 'SEM ENTRADA'
Returns erro field if chart region cannot be detected from pixel data

file_operations.description: Create local candle analysis engine that: (1) accepts a File/Blob image; (2) draws it onto HTML Canvas to read pixel data; (3) detects candlestick chart region by scanning for alternating green/red vertical columns; (4) identifies last 5–7 visible candles by body color (green=bullish, red=bearish), body height, wick length, relative position; (5) computes next-candle probability score based on trend direction (ascending tops/bottoms=ALTA, descending=BAIXA, otherwise=LATERAL), last candle pattern (engulfing, hammer, shooting star, doji, pin bar from body-to-wick ratio), momentum (consecutive same-color candles); (6) returns LocalAnalysisResult with sinal ('COMPRA'|'VENDA'|'SEM ENTRADA'), tendencia, confianca (0–100), probabilidade_alta (0–100), probabilidade_baixa (0–100), padroes (string[] in Portuguese), forca ('fraca'|'média'|'forte'), explicacao (Portuguese sentence), erro (optional). Probabilities must sum to 100. If chart region undetectable, set erro to 'Não foi possível identificar o gráfico corretamente' and return SEM ENTRADA signal. All logic runs client-side with zero HTTP requests

requirements.summary: Define LocalAnalysisResult TypeScript interface with all candle analysis fields and JSDoc comments
acceptanceCriteria: LocalAnalysisResult interface is exported and used by the analysis engine and results components
All fields have correct TypeScript types
JSDoc comments are present on each field

file_operations.description: Create new type definition file exporting LocalAnalysisResult interface with fields: sinal ('COMPRA'|'VENDA'|'SEM ENTRADA'), tendencia ('ALTA'|'BAIXA'|'LATERAL'), confianca (number), probabilidade_alta (number), probabilidade_baixa (number), padroes (string[]), forca ('fraca'|'média'|'forte'), explicacao (string), pontuacao (optional number), erro (optional string). Add JSDoc comments on each field explaining purpose and noting all analysis is local without external API calls

requirements.summary: Update ProcessingScreen to use local candle analysis engine with four Portuguese stages and error handling
acceptanceCriteria: No HTTP requests are made during the processing screen
All four Portuguese stages animate sequentially
Successful analysis navigates to Results page with LocalAnalysisResult in sessionStorage
Error state shows 'Não foi possível identificar o gráfico corretamente' with retry button
No API key validation step occurs

file_operations.description: Replace external API calls with local candle analysis engine. When analysis starts: (1) load image from sessionStorage; (2) display four sequential Portuguese stages (Carregando imagem → Processando dados → Detectando padrões → Gerando resultado) with animated indicators, advancing each stage on short timeout; (3) call analyzeChartImage(file) from localCandleAnalysis.ts during 'Detectando padrões' stage; (4) on success, store LocalAnalysisResult in sessionStorage and navigate to Results; (5) if result contains erro field, display Portuguese error message 'Não foi possível identificar o gráfico corretamente' with 'Tentar novamente' button navigating back to AnalyzeChart; (6) remove all API key validation checks and HTTP error handling (404, 403, etc.)

requirements.summary: Create or update response mapper to convert LocalAnalysisResult to internal AnalysisResult format
acceptanceCriteria: Mapper function accepts LocalAnalysisResult and returns an internal AnalysisResult
All new fields (probabilidade_alta, probabilidade_baixa, forca) are preserved
Existing Results.tsx and History components receive correctly mapped data

file_operations.description: Update or create mapper function to convert LocalAnalysisResult fields to internal AnalysisResult format used by Results.tsx and history components. Preserve probabilidade_alta, probabilidade_baixa, forca, padroes, tendencia, confianca, sinal, explicacao fields through mapping. Ensure all fields are available for rendering in results and history views

requirements.summary: Display uploaded chart screenshot as small thumbnail (~80×60 px) beside results output
acceptanceCriteria: A small chart thumbnail (~80×60 px) appears beside the results output
Thumbnail is retrieved from sessionStorage and rendered as an element
Thumbnail has rounded corners and a subtle border matching the current theme
Thumbnail is visible in both dark and light mode

file_operations.description: Add small chart thumbnail (~80×60 px) positioned beside main analysis output area. Retrieve image data URL from sessionStorage using the key used during upload. Style thumbnail with subtle border and rounded corners consistent with active dark/light theme. Thumbnail must be visible alongside results, not below them, serving as visual reference for analyzed chart

requirements.summary: Display probability sentence and two horizontal percentage bars (ALTA green, BAIXA red) in Results page
acceptanceCriteria: Probability sentence appears prominently below the signal card
Text reads 'XX% de probabilidade de ALTA / YY% de BAIXA na próxima vela' with correct values
ALTA text and bar are styled green; BAIXA text and bar are styled red
Two horizontal percentage bars are proportionally filled
Section only renders when probabilidade_alta and probabilidade_baixa are present

file_operations.description: Add prominent probability sentence near top of results, immediately below signal card. Sentence reads in Portuguese: '[XX]% de probabilidade de ALTA / [YY]% de BAIXA na próxima vela' where XX is probabilidade_alta and YY is probabilidade_baixa from analysis result. Style ALTA portion in green and BAIXA portion in red. Show two horizontal percentage bar indicators side by side (green bar for ALTA, red bar for BAIXA) filling proportionally to their values

requirements.summary: Display candle analysis output fields in specified order with Portuguese labels and color-coded badges
acceptanceCriteria: Results fields render in the specified order: Tendência, Padrões, Força, Confiança, Sinal, Explicação
Força badge uses gray/amber/green styling for fraca/média/forte
Sinal shows ↑ for COMPRA (green), ↓ for VENDA (red), neutral for SEM ENTRADA
Explicação sentence renders below the signal
Error message displays prominently when erro field is present

file_operations.description: Update Results page to display candle analysis fields in following order with Portuguese labels: (1) Tendência (ALTA/BAIXA/LATERAL); (2) Padrões encontrados (list from padroes array); (3) Força (fraca/média/forte with color-coded badge: gray=fraca, amber=média, green=forte); (4) Confiança percentage; (5) Sinal (COMPRA ↑ / VENDA ↓ / SEM ENTRADA) with directional arrows and color coding; (6) Explicação (one-sentence Portuguese explanation from explicacao field). Ensure order is consistent and all labels are Portuguese (Brazil). If result contains erro field, display Portuguese error message prominently instead of results fields

requirements.summary: Replace Gemini API key section in Settings with 'Configuração de Análise de Candles' section showing local engine info
acceptanceCriteria: No Gemini API key field or section appears in Settings
A 'Configuração de Análise de Candles' section header is visible
Read-only row shows 'Motor de análise: Local (sem API externa)'
AI sensitivity, timeframe, and daily limit controls remain functional
Theme toggle and notifications settings remain unchanged

file_operations.description: Remove Gemini API key section entirely and replace with 'Configuração de Análise de Candles' section containing: (1) read-only informational row labeled 'Motor de análise' showing value 'Local (sem API externa)'; (2) existing AI sensitivity slider labeled 'Sensibilidade da IA'; (3) existing default timeframe selector (M1/M5/M10) labeled 'Timeframe padrão'; (4) existing daily operation limit selector labeled 'Operações por dia'. All labels in Portuguese (Brazil). Keep all other existing settings (theme toggle, notifications) unchanged
